response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings over 20 years of broad software engineering experience and has recently contributed to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, which is relevant but insufficient for a Director-level AI strategy role. The position requires recognized, deep AI expertise with demonstrated platforms built with AI, cloud platform strategy experience, and the seniority to advise strategic enterprise customers — none of which are clearly evidenced in this resume. His background is that of a strong staff-level full-stack engineer rather than an AI-focused principal strategist, and he lacks advanced credentials (no Master's or PhD in AI), cloud platform depth, and any indication of external AI thought leadership or advisory experience.
strengths: 20+ years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, comfortably exceeding the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on AI-adjacent work including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq, showing awareness of the AI tooling landscape
Entrepreneurial background (GISCollective founder, early-stage startup experience at WatchUp and RIDE Capital) aligns with the intrapreneurial mindset the role seeks
concerns: No demonstrated recognition as an AI expert — no publications, major AI conference talks, or AI-specific products with meaningful scale or industry visibility
No cloud platform strategy experience; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is the only cloud signal, far below the depth needed to advise enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption
Currently operating at Staff Engineer level with no evidence of Director-level IC responsibilities such as setting technical vision, influencing cross-org strategy, or advising external partners
